title: Create: Tracks+
description:
This mod is a fork of qwxon's Create:Tracks.
Add Create:Trackwork style tracks to game.
Need Aeronautics to work.
body:
This mod is a fork of qwxon's mod, Create:Tracks.
This mod adds tracks similar to those in Trackwork for Aeronautics.
This mod is not compatible with Create:Tracks. Please replace it.

I've made the appearance and structure of the tracks more similar to Trackwork, while also incorporating the best features of Tracks.

I implemented a high-clearance suspension system similar to Trackwork,
modified the track mounts to bypass the power source, and fixed the drop items that appear upon destruction.!

[Trackwork's Style](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed45d677cc52d7e2f301095f3181680c3b51b2bb.png)

I would like to express my deepest respect to qwxon, the original creator of this fork.
